Interface IView

All Superinterfaces:
Observer
All Known Subinterfaces:
IAttackView, IConnectCountryView, ICreateContinentView, ICreateCountryView, IEditContinentView, IFortificationView, IGameModeView, INewGameView, IReinforcementView, IStartUpView, ITournamentDetailView, IWelcomeScreenView
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractSwingView, SwingAttackView, SwingConnectCountryView, SwingCreateContinentView, SwingCreateCountryView, SwingEditContinentView, SwingFortificationView, SwingGameModeView, SwingNewGameView, SwingReinforcementView, SwingStartUpView, SwingTournamentDetailView, SwingWelcomeScreenView
public interface IView extends Observer
Rule to build a view
Author:
KaranbirPannu
